zh.lifeSummary: 當Bernhard III. Herzog von Sachsen Fürst von Anhalt於1140年出生在德國薩辛可萊斯 德累斯頓德累斯頓時，他的父親Albrecht I. 'der Bär' von Brandenburg41歲，母親Sophie von Winzenburg32歲。他於1169年與Prinzessin Judith Piast在波蘭維爾可波爾斯吉波茲南結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1212年2月9日在德國薩辛德累斯頓享年72歲，埋葬在德國薩辛-安哈爾特可德林波格巴倫斯泰特巴倫斯泰特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Bernhard III. Herzog von Sachsen Fürst von Anhalt于1140年出生在德国薩辛可萊斯 德累斯頓德累斯頓时，他的父亲Albrecht I. 'der Bär' von Brandenburg41岁，母亲Sophie von Winzenburg32岁。他于1169年与Prinzessin Judith Piast在波兰維爾可波爾斯吉波茲南结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1212年2月9日在德国薩辛德累斯頓享年72岁，埋葬在德国薩辛-安哈爾特可德林波格巴倫斯泰特巴倫斯泰特。

nameMeanings.name: Bernhard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Bernd
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from ber(n) ‘bear’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’. This was the name of three famous medieval churchmen: St Bernard of Menthon ( 923–1008 ), founder of a hospice on each of the Alpine passes named after him; the monastic reformer St Bernard of Clairvaux ( 1090–1153 ); and the scholastic philosopher Bernard of Chartres. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England. A native Old English form, Beornheard, was superseded by the Norman form.

variants.name: Bernard
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from ber(n) ‘bear’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’. This was the name of three famous medieval churchmen: St Bernard of Menthon ( 923–1008 ), founder of a hospice on each of the Alpine passes named after him; the monastic reformer St Bernard of Clairvaux ( 1090–1153 ); and the scholastic philosopher Bernard of Chartres. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England. A native Old English form, Beornheard, was superseded by the Norman form.

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Bernhard III. Herzog von Sachsen Fürst von Anhalt was born in 1140, in Dresden, Kreis Dresden, Saxony, Germany, his father, Albrecht I. 'der Bär' von Brandenburg, was 41 and his mother, Sophie von Winzenburg, was 32. He married Prinzessin Judith Piast in 1169, in Poznań, Greater Poland, Poland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 9 February 1212, in Dresden, Saxony, Germany, at the age of 72, and was buried in Ballenstedt, Ballenstedt, Quedlinburg, Saxony-Anhalt, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bernhard III. Herzog von Sachsen Fürst von Anhalt est né en 1140, à Dresden, Kreis Dresden, Sachsen, Allemagne, son père, Albrecht I. 'der Bär' von Brandenburg, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Sophie von Winzenburg, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Prinzessin Judith Piast en 1169, à Poznań, wielkopolskie, Pologne. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 9 février 1212, à Dresden, Sachsen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterré à Ballenstedt, Ballenstedt, Quedlinburg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Bernhard III. Herzog von Sachsen Fürst von Anhalt 1140 in Dresden, Kreis Dresden, Sachsen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Albrecht I. 'der Bär' von Brandenburg 41 und seine Mutter Sophie von Winzenburg 32. Er hat 1169 in Poznań, Woiwodschaft Großpolen, Polen Prinzessin Judith Piast geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 9. Februar 1212 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Dresden, Sachsen, Deutschland und wurde in Ballenstedt, Ballenstedt, Quedlinburg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Bernhard III. Herzog von Sachsen Fürst von Anhalt è nato il nel 1140 nel Dresden, Kreis Dresden, Sachsen, Germania, il suo padre, Albrecht I. 'der Bär' von Brandenburg, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Sophie von Winzenburg, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Prinzessin Judith Piast nel 1169, nel Poznań, wielkopolskie, Polonia. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 9 febbraio 1212, nel Dresden, Sachsen, Germania, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolto a Ballenstedt, Ballenstedt, Quedlinburg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Bernhard III. Herzog von Sachsen Fürst von Anhaltが1140年にドイツサチセンクレイス ドレスデンドレスデンで生まれた時，父Albrecht I. 'der Bär' von Brandenburgは41歳，母Sophie von Winzenburgは32歳であった。1169年にポーランドウィエルコプオルスキポズナnでPrinzessin Judith Piastと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1212年2月9日にドイツサチセンドレスデンで72歳で死去し，ドイツサチセン-アンハルトクエドリンブルグボーレンステトボーレンステトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Bernhard III. Herzog von Sachsen Fürst von Anhalt(이)가 1140년 독일 작센 크레이스 드레즈든 드레즈든에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Albrecht I. 'der Bär' von Brandenburg(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Sophie von Winzenburg(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1169년 폴란드 위코포스키 포즈나n에서 Prinzessin Judith Piast(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1212년 2월 9일 독일 작센 드레즈든에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 작센-아할트 크들린버그 바렌스테드트 바렌스테드트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Bernhard III. Herzog von Sachsen Fürst von Anhalt nasceu em 1140, em Dresden, Kreis Dresden, Sachsen, Alemanha, seu pai, Albrecht I. 'der Bär' von Brandenburg, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Sophie von Winzenburg, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Prinzessin Judith Piast em 1169, em Poznań, wielkopolskie, Polônia. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 9 de fevereiro de 1212, em Dresden, Sachsen, Alemanha, com 72 anos, e foi sepultado em Ballenstedt, Ballenstedt, Quedlinburg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bernhard III. Herzog von Sachsen Fürst von Anhalt родился в 1140 г. в местности дресден, крис дресден, сачсен, Германия, его отцу по имени Albrecht I. 'der Bär' von Brandenburg было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Sophie von Winzenburg, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Prinzessin Judith Piast в 1169 г. в местности познаn, виелкополски, Польша. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 9 февраля 1212 г. в местности дресден, сачсен, Германия в возрасте 72 лет и был похоронен в местности балленстедт, балленстедт, куедлинбург, сачсен-анэлт, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Bernhard III. Herzog von Sachsen Fürst von Anhalt nació en 1140, en Dresden, Kreis Dresden, Sachsen, Alemania, su papá, Albrecht I. 'der Bär' von Brandenburg, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Sophie von Winzenburg, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Prinzessin Judith Piast en 1169, en Poznań, wielkopolskie, Polonia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 9 de febrero de 1212, en Dresden, Sachsen, Alemania, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultado en Ballenstedt, Ballenstedt, Quedlinburg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Alemania.
